texto: We must stand firm between two kinds of madness: the belief that we can do anything
autor: and the belief that we can do nothing.
explicacao: Orientação direta de and the belief that we can do nothing. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “We must stand firm between two kinds of madness: the belief that we can do anything” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, alain, stand, útil em momentos de reflexao.
